about: PhD in Computer Science. I keep technical teams focused on what ships and stakeholders aligned on goals, scope, and trade-offs. I surface non-obvious requirements early, hold the line for strong UX, and I do not negotiate on data: I work data-driven. Associate Member of the International Requirements Engineering Board (IREB).

experience.body: Led applied innovation projects with SMEs and startups across energy, mobility, and AI — from roadmap to delivery. Coached Product Owners and Agile teams on backlog prioritisation, cross-team coordination, and value delivery across Agile Release Trains. Secured research funding; managed stakeholder relationships and coordinated release plans with internal and external partners.
Mentored 50+ students/year through full software project lifecycle; taught SE seminar and supervised BSc/MSc theses.
Built React front-ends from UI/UX specs; responsible for HTML, CSS, and frontend logic.
Elicited requirements from Volksbank clients; developed a single-page sports app using Angular and Django REST.
PLM development on Windchill; delivered enterprise web apps for Cox Communications and other telecom clients.

skills.items: Technical Project Management, Roadmapping, Requirements Engineering

highlights: Local Organizer XP'25 — 26th International Conference on Agile Software Development.
Reviewer / PC member at IEEE RE, REFSQ, XP, TOSEM, EMSE, IST, ICT4S, SE-SRC (2012–2026).
Co-organizer of the 9th & 10th International Workshop on Crowd-Based Requirements Engineering (2025, 2026).
